title: Accountant Cum Admin
description:
Job Description & Requirements

Roles & Reasonability:

Salary S$1800 – S$3500

• Handle general Admin cum Accountant work

• Coordinate with vendors and clients to resolve any inquiries

related to financial transactions.

• Maintain proper documentations and filing

• Admin support on purchase order, logistic arrangement,

delivery order, invoices etc.

• Manage email correspondence and coordinate with team for smooth work operation

• Keeping track of onboard process employees .

• Proper records of all SOP, workflow and risk assessment documents

• Proper records of all safety documents

• Maintain Payroll, daily attendance ,employee details and co-ordination

• Preparation of quotation for subcontractor

• Maintain reliable and accurate stock records

• Ensure accurate and timely updates to ERP system

• Maintain proper documentation and filling records

• Ensure all DO are updated into the system before month-end closing

• Provide general administrative support to the team to ensure

smooth operations.



Essential Skills and Qualifications:


1. Good understanding of simple accounting principles
2. Excellent communication skills
3. Diploma / Degree with 2 – 5 years Experience 
4. Ability to work accurately and efficiently

postedCompany.description:
Hitech Images was established in April 2009 providing services in the inkjet printing industries. Providing Services in the Large format printing and Technology Company - Specializes in the production of Large Prints and images, posters, banners,Vehicle Stickers, Signages, LED Signages, Acrylic Cut-out Letters, Acrylic Light Box, T-Shirt Printing, Books Magazine, Website Design & Hosting, Web Development, Advertisement Flim, Creative Logo Design with a range of experience in signages manufacturing.


Over years, today it is known as Hi-Tech Images Pte. Ltd. with a past proven records of producing products ranging from indoor to outdoor services. Using the latest, state of the Art Technology in Digital Printing and most current softwares, we are able to produce & deliver on-time delivery with high quality image anticipating your needs & exceeds your requirements.


Our business set-up concept is to provide consultations & professionalism services in terms of planning using high quality digital printing technology to suit your requirements. Our professional services had extended to the following industries :-

  • Advertising Agencies
  • Design & Communications House
  • Marketing Consultants
  • Exhibition Companies
  • Property Developers
  • Government & Statuatories Boards
  • Commercial Companies
  • Retail Outlets
  • MRT & LRT Trains
  • Vans, Trucks & Buses
postedCompany.name: HI-TECH IMAGES PTE. LTD.
